archetype: High Fantasy / Parchment (Custom adaptation of Organic & Earthy)
design_philosophy: Epic, adventurous, and ancient. A storybook or scholar's journal feel. No modern tech-SaaS styles, no purple gradients, no Inter/Roboto. Content is king, presented with rich texture and deep, warm colors.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl tracking-tight font-heading font-bold text-ink_dark
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl tracking-tight font-heading font-semibold text-ink_brown

layout_and_spacing.container: max-w-5xl mx-auto px-6 sm:px-8 py-12 sm:py-20
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use py-16 or py-24 between major sections to let the parchment breathe.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Headings are often centered for a cinematic/storybook feel. Body text is left-aligned for readability.
layout_and_spacing.texture: Apply a subtle SVG noise/grain overlay globally with mix-blend-multiply opacity-20 to simulate real parchment paper. Never use pure flat colors for large backgrounds.

navigation.style: Sticky top nav. Background bg-parchment/90 with backdrop-blur-md. Bottom border 1px solid border-divider. Links use UI font (Cinzel), text-sm, tracking-widest, uppercase. Active state: underline decoration in accent-gold.

hero.style: Massive image banner (max-h-[70vh] object-cover), overlaid with a centered 'Title Plate' (bg-parchment_dark/80 backdrop-blur-sm, border 2px solid accent-gold, p-12).

accordion.style: Use Shadcn Accordion but heavily customized. Remove default blue focus rings. Wrap each item in a parchment card (bg-paper border-l-4 border-accent-forest shadow-sm). Title should be H3 (Cormorant Garamond). The expand icon can be a classic plus/minus or a chevron-down colored in accent-ember.

edit_mode.toggle: Floating action button or nav icon (lock/unlock) fixed to top right or nav bar. Requires PIN '264185' to unlock.
edit_mode.active_state: When unlocked, all editable text fields and image containers receive a subtle `border-dashed border-2 border-accent-ember bg-white/40 cursor-text` to indicate editability.
edit_mode.inputs: Use transparent input/textarea elements that seamlessly blend into the typography when unfocused, but show the edit border when hovered/focused.

image_container.style: Images should have a subtle sepia or warm filter (sepia-[.20]) to blend with the parchment. Border 4px solid border-divider, rounded-sm. In edit mode, clicking the image prompts for a new URL paste.

motion.accordion: Smooth height expansion (Shadcn default is fine, adjust easing to ease-out).
motion.hover: Nav links and buttons slightly lift (-translate-y-0.5) and text color shifts to accent-ember.

misty_mountains.description: Epic misty mountains layered in soft tones
misty_mountains.usage: Events page hero or section image.

parchment_bg.usage: Can be used as an image overlay or section background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a React (Vite) frontend with Tailwind CSS.
Set up React Router with 5 specific routes: '/', '/motivations', '/philosophy', '/traits', '/events'.

Global State/Storage: Implement a simple React Context or just a custom hook to manage the 'isEditing' boolean and 'content' JSON object, syncing to localStorage. All text and image URLs must be loaded from this state.
Create a PIN Modal component: Clicking the lock icon opens a modal requesting PIN '264185'. On success, set 'isEditing' to true.

Editable Content Components: Create reusable <EditableText /> and <EditableImage /> components. When `isEditing` is true, clicking these turns them into inline inputs/textareas or prompts for a new image URL.
Layout structure: A permanent Top Nav with the 5 links and the lock icon.

Section Pages: Each of the 4 non-home pages must contain Shadcn Accordions. Fill them with placeholder text about Bilbo Baggins that relates to the section title (e.g., Big 5 Personality Traits: Openness, Conscientiousness, etc.).

Aesthetics: Include the fonts via Google Fonts in index.html (Cormorant Garamond, Merriweather, Cinzel). Set the body background color to the 'parchment' hex value. Apply a CSS-based noise texture overlay across the app.

Testing Attributes: MUST include data-testid on every interactive element (links, buttons, accordion triggers, edit inputs) e.g., data-testid='nav-home', data-testid='edit-toggle', data-testid='pin-input', data-testid='save-content'.
